name: claude-codex-bridge
description: Codex host plugin for Codex -> Claude Code workflows through consultation, debate, review skills, and optional Claude Code MCP wiring.

interface.shortDescription: Consult and debate with Claude Code from Codex, and optionally register Claude as a Codex MCP server.
interface.longDescription: Adds Codex-side skills for asking Claude Code for a second opinion, running explicit multi-round debates, requesting Claude-backed reviews, and wiring `claude mcp serve` into Codex as an MCP server when you want Claude Code tools inside Codex.
defaultPrompt: Use the claude-integration skill to get Claude Code's view on this subsystem.
Use the claude-debate skill to debate this design choice with Claude Code.
Use the claude-review skill to review my uncommitted changes.
Use the install-claude-code-mcp skill to add Claude Code as an MCP server for Codex.
